feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Issue in PS Module - Billing of activities with quantum in 2 places after decimal
entry.content:
With the change in business process, a new billing activity has been added and its quantity has been defined up to two decimal places. For example, Geological Mapping – 10.85 SKM.

However, while entering the same in the PS module and during confirmation, the system is automatically rounding it to one decimal place, resulting in 10.90 SKM. This is not correct and is creating a discrepancy in the recorded quantity.

Kindly let us know for the resolution to get two decimal place in SKM measurement.

entry.title: Asset classes for dep areas 01, 02, and 15 are active in Z01, Z03, and Z04 system except Z02 system.
entry.content:
There are 17 asset classes for which depreciation areas 01, 02, and 15 are active for company code 201 in the Z01, Z03, and Z04 systems, but not in the Z02 system. Please find the list of these asset classes. 

AC010100AC021000AC030000AC030070AC050000AC060000AC060010AC070000AC090000AC090001AC090010AC090011AC090020AC100000AC110000AC120000AC160000

We now need to activate depreciation area

entry.title: Clarification Required for Manual Activity in SAP Note 2387818
entry.content:
We are currently implementing SAP Note 2387818 in our ES1 system.

During the manual implementation, we need clarification on the recommended implementation approach.

Could you please confirm whether the required fields or changes should be implemented by directly modifying the standard SAP structure or object?

Alternatively, is it recommended to create and use an append structure or enhancement instead?

If direct modification is the intended approach, please confirm that this is the implementation expected by SAP Note 2387818.

If an append structure or enhancement is supported, could you please provide the recommended implementation procedure or best practice?

We would like to follow SAP's recommended approach to ensure compatibility with future upgrades and note implementations.

Your guidance on the correct implementation method would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Some assets are showing zero value in asset master record.
entry.content:
Unable to retire fully depreciated assets 40580 and 40584 due to depreciation key YLIN scrap value configuration.

Unable to retire fully depreciated assets 40580 and 40584 due to depreciation key YLIN scrap value configuration.

We require guidance on the correct asset accounting configuration.

Company code: DDN and Assets: 40580 & 40584

Both assets are assigned Depreciation Key YLIN in Depreciation Area 06(MGAAP).

SAP previously confirmed that Depreciation Key YLIN is configured with a 5% scrap value and that both assets are already fully depreciated with Net Book Value =0. Because of this configuration, retirement by scrapping fails.

We would like guidance on the correct configuration approach to retire these assets without affecting other assets that use the same depreciation key. 

Kindly advise:

  1. Whether the scrap value percentage should be temporarily removed from depreciation key YLIN.
  2. Whether a new depreciation key should be created for fully depreciated assets.
  3. What is the SAP-recommended approach to retire these assets while maintaining configuration consistency.

entry.title: Ungroup invoices to be paid for the same vendor in DMEE
entry.content:
I would like to send vendor invoices to the bank for factoring as payment file (SEPA format) and the process is working, but in case if If I have  one vendor w 2 invoices and w 2 separate due dates, DMEE is grouping the two invoices and only one due date appears in the file. 

Due date is in Tag which appears only once in the file. Expectation is that file will be created as it would be two difference vendors.

I have tried different settings in fbzp and DMEE sorting, but w/o success.

entry.title: to enable the mass upload functionality embedded in transaction KP26.
entry.content:
to enable the mass upload functionality embedded in transaction KP26. This goes in within transaction KP26 in settings > EXTRA > EXCEL PLANNING > UPLOAD.

Could you please advise standard configuration and upload file for embedded mass upload functionality in transaction KP26.

entry.title: Organizational Unit Not Appearing in F4 Help for AB Partner Function in Quality Notification
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I created a new Organizational Unit using transaction PPOCE. However, when I create/change a Quality Notification (QM01/QM02) and try to assign the Org Unit to partner function AB – Department Responsible, the newly created Org Unit does not appear in the F4 value help.

However, if I try to assign the Org unit value manually, it accepts.

I have already verified that the Org Unit was created successfully in PPOCE.
Could you please advise which configuration or settings should be checked to ensure that newly created Org Units are available in the F4 help for partner function AB?

Specifically, I would like to know:

  • Does the Org Unit need to be assigned to a particular organizational hierarchy or relationship?
  • Are there any HR OM tables/relationships that need to be maintained or updated?
  • Is there any buffer refresh or consistency check required after creating a new Org Unit?

System: [S/4HANA 2023]

I really appreciate any help you can provide.

Best Regards,

entry.title: MRP compensation strategy not working
entry.content:
The requirement is to run MRP in such a way that the independent requirement (VSFB) is 'offset' by the dependent requirements (OrdRes).

Even though we are using MRP strategy 70 and consumption indicator for planning requirements= 2, the MRP is not performing the compensation!

In the example below, the system should not have generated the planned order 5.400 kg

entry.title: Classification does not exist under Extras of transaction BP for BP roles FI Customer, SA Customer
entry.content:
Classification does not exist under Extras of transaction BP for BP roles FI Customer, SA Customer
DV3 - for CVI notes implementation. 

I have looked at this note, I do see software component match to ours ABA 750, but no corrections for ABA 750 or any manual corrections. 
2326148 - Classification Functionality on Business Partner Customer / Supplier side

entry.title: How to change the serial number user status RECG
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently facing an issue with a serial number status. In IQ02, one of the serial numbers is stuck with the user status RECG (“Product Recognition”), and we have been unable to remove or change this status despite trying multiple approaches.

Could you please advise where and how this status can be modified or removed?

Thanks,

Vinod

entry.title: Table activation in EHS
entry.content:
Getting an error below, while trying to create PO from WAE02 disposal processing. While analysed, came to know MM-PM integration, below needs to be maintained. we are in ECC EHP7 SP16 pack. Is it possible to activate the tables or transaction WACM01/02

  1. The maintenance dialog for EHSWAC_ENTAMBW is incomplete or not defined

Message No. SV037

 

  1. Table/view EHSWAD_ENTDOC is not in the Dictionary - Message No. SV164

 

When analyses, it was came to know that the FM calls the table below :

Account Assignment Category (KNTTP) NOT set in SPRO Purchasing Parameters — MOST LIKELY

In your SPRO config table EHSWAC_ENTAMBW (configured via Specify Parameters for Purchasing / WACM30), the field KNTTP (Account Assignment Category) is either:

  • Blank — not filled at all
  • Set to a value that conflicts with your cost centre setup

When KNTTP is blank, the FM EHSWA_112_DATA_FOR_PO still tries to build a POACCOUNT row but cannot assign a proper item number to it — resulting in item number 00000 being passed to BAPI.

 

Table check in NES : While executing the transaction WACM30 or in SM30 – table :

 

 

 

Please do needful to create PO from WAE02 transaction with out any errors.

entry.title: Asset master missing expired useful life/period field under deprecation TAB
entry.content: Asset master missing expired useful life/period field under deprecation TAB

entry.title: Unable to scrap Assets 40580 & 40584 Error During Asset Retirement.
entry.content:
We are unable to retire the following assets in production:
Company Code: DDN, Assets: 40580 & 40584
Earlier we faced a fiscal year closing issue, which has now been resolved successfully.
However, while performing Asset Retirement by Scrapping(ABAVN), THE SYSTEM ISSUES THE FOLLOWING ERROR: "Message AA465- Posting of retirement not possible(error in the asset)".
We alsoexecuted AFAR, checked the depreciation key(YLIN), depreciation area 06, and Asset Explorer(AW01N).
SAP previously confirmed that depreciation key YLIN has a 5% scrap value (IND), and both assets have already reached net book value equals to zero, indicating that the issue is related to system configuration rather than an SAP software defect.
We request guidance on the correct configuration or business process required to successfully retire/scrap these two assets without causing inconsistency.

entry.title: Unable to scrap Assets 40580 & 40584 Error During Asset Retirement.
entry.content:
We are unable to retire the following assets in production:
Company Code: DDN, Assets: 40580 & 40584
Earlier we faced a fiscal year closing issue, which has now been resolved successfully.
However, while performing Asset Retirement by Scrapping(ABAVN), THE SYSTEM ISSUES THE FOLLOWING ERROR: "Message AA465- Posting of retirement not possible(error in the asset)".
We alsoexecuted AFAR, checked the depreciation key(YLIN), depreciation area 06, and Asset Explorer(AW01N).
SAP previously confirmed that depreciation key YLIN has a 5% scrap value (IND), and both assets have already reached net book value equals to zero, indicating that the issue is related to system configuration rather than an SAP software defect.
We request guidance on the correct configuration or business process required to successfully retire/scrap these two assets without causing inconsistency.

entry.title: SAP ECC PE1 – issue generating invoice from transfer order
entry.content:
Hi Team

User facing this error while TO in SAP, packaging shipment 224558105

entry.title: User is not able to perform TECO, getting error message: System status XSez is active (ORD 811681)
entry.content: User is not able to perform TECO, getting error message: System status XSez is active (ORD 811681). Normally they discard the PIsheets, remove the Xsteps in the process order & it will TECO.

entry.title: Sub-ID:"PERIOD_CHECK"
entry.content:
Hi,

We are busy with a SAP RISE S/4 migration and picked up an SI item we do not know how to fix.

The error is:

Sub-ID:"PERIOD_CHECK"

Invalid date periods found. Run detailed check for more info. - See note: 2197392.

But we have no details on which materials contain invalid dates or how to fix it.

Can you please assist?

Thanks

Hanlie

entry.title: Error in storage location determination using VA01 creating with reference
entry.content:
We have the wrong storage location determined in the return sales order 0888057809  

As per the configuration it should be picked 1002 it got picked with 1000

entry.title: PO can be tagged as delivery complete or final invoice
entry.content: PO can be tagged as delivery complete or final invoice though GR/IR is not equal or there's still discrepancies between GR and IR

entry.title: MD01/02/03 Default setting and check values
entry.content:
I have seen that there are a few questions about the same theme....

Sorry. 

But I have the requirement that the default values in different SAP-Transaction (Old Gui :-)) shout be changed. 

A few of the values are hardcoded in e. G. MM61XO20_INIT_D0150 in MODULE INIT_D0150 OUTPUT: 
    MOVE CHAR1   TO RM61X-DISER.

I have also read that there ist Transaction SHD0. But this way doesn't work by me. 
Also is a way to say the user - bevore you work - pleas save the settings in the transaciton (beause the user can save them in the Menu)...
But this is not a secure way....

Is there a way to make an enhancement to set the default values? I think that that is also cracy - how I am sure I have realized it in every Transaktion where I need them...

There is also the requirement - how cann we check - that the user has not changed the input-values. Or can we change the input-fields to only output, that the user can´t change them...

A Alternative solution can be to write the table UMD01 (Default Values for mrp). Than use an Enhancement way if there is an update / write bei User-IDOC. 

If it is necessary - we have S4Hana on Premise - SAP S/4HANA 2023. 

I am very curious to see what possible solutions exist and which ones other have chosen / preffered.
